data.title: KRP Development Holdings Issues Profit Warning Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

An update from KRP Development Holdings Limited ( (HK:2421) ) is now available.

KRP Development Holdings Limited has issued a profit warning, anticipating a 50% decrease in profit attributable to equity shareholders for the six months ended 30 September 2025 compared to the same period in 2024. This decline is attributed to reduced property sales due to fluctuating market conditions in the PRC real estate market and a decrease in the fair value of the company’s investment properties. Despite these challenges, the company maintains a strong financial position with no bank borrowings and a healthy net cash position, indicating operational resilience.

More about KRP Development Holdings Limited

KRP Development Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily engaged in the real estate industry. The company focuses on property sales and investment properties, with a market focus on the real estate sector in the People’s Republic of China (PRC).

data.title: Build King Holdings Updates Nomination Committee Terms
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

The latest update is out from Build King Holdings ( (HK:0240) ).

Build King Holdings Limited, listed under stock code 00240, has amended the terms of reference for its Nomination Committee. The committee will consist of at least three members, primarily independent non-executive directors, with a requirement for gender diversity. Meetings will be held at least annually, and the company secretary will act as the committee’s secretary. These changes aim to enhance the governance structure and ensure effective decision-making within the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0240) stock is a Buy with a HK$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Build King Holdings stock, see the HK:0240 Stock Forecast page.

data.title: PegBio Co., Ltd. Receives Approval for Innovative Diabetes Drug PB-119
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

PegBio Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2565) ) just unveiled an announcement.

PegBio Co., Ltd. announced that the China National Medical Products Administration has approved the new drug application for PB-119, a long-acting GLP-1 receptor agonist. This approval marks a significant milestone for PegBio, as PB-119 offers comprehensive management of type 2 diabetes by improving blood glucose control, blood pressure, blood lipids, and weight. The drug’s unique molecular structure and innovative PEGylation technology enhance its efficacy and safety profile, potentially strengthening PegBio’s position in the pharmaceutical industry.

More about PegBio Co., Ltd. Class H

PegBio Co., Ltd. is a pharmaceutical company based in China, focusing on the development of innovative drugs. Their primary product, PB-119, is a glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonist aimed at treating type 2 diabetes mellitus.
